garage.name: Bike Garage
garage.description: A garage for your big bike. Come here to ride it out to the farm.
config.buildCost.name: Build cost (G)
config.buildCost.tooltip: How much gold Robin charges to build the garage.
config.wood.name: Wood required
config.wood.tooltip: How much wood is needed to build the garage.
config.stone.name: Stone required
config.stone.tooltip: How much stone is needed to build the garage.
config.buildDays.name: Build days
config.buildDays.tooltip: How many days Robin takes to build the garage.
config.engineOff.name: Engine off button
config.engineOff.tooltip: Kill the engine. The engine keeps idling after you dismount until you press this. Supports keyboard and controller.
config.rev.name: Rev button (hold)
config.rev.tooltip: Hold to rev the engine in place (keyboard and controller).
config.minSpeed.name: Min speed (gear 1)
config.minSpeed.tooltip: Speed in 1st gear. Gears shift up automatically as you ride.
config.maxSpeed.name: Max speed (gear 6)
config.volume.name: Engine volume
config.volume.tooltip: Engine sound volume (0 = mute, 1 = normal, 2 = loudest).
